prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约 9564→7397→5903→5166→6528 名。2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），但 2025 年出现明显后移（6528 名，较 2024 年扩大约 1362 名），表明 2025 年报考热度有所回落。近 5 年波动幅度较大，2025 年基准位次约 6528 名；该校在云南省理科组计划：2021 年 43 人、2022 年 37 人、2023 年 36 人、2024 年 37 人、2025 年（物理类）42 人；2026 年计划 33 人，较 2025 年缩招约 21.4%。缩招意味着名额减少，在需求不变或增加时竞争将加剧，对位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021 年第 50 名→2022 年第 53 名→2023 年第 49 名→2024 年第 45 名→2025 年第 43 名→2026 年第 43 名，排名稳定在 43–45 区间，属于中上游 211 院校，层次认可度稳步提升；该校在声誉文件中未出现明显负面事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第 27 位，评价「较热」，综合热度约 172 万，主要关联「国防七子」「三海一核」等标签，短视频曝光度较高，对考生关注度有正向拉动；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，历史录取稳定；第五轮学科 评估中，控制科学与工程获评 A 等级，为该校唯一 A 类学科。该校以「三海一核」（船舶工业、海军装备、海洋开发、核能应用）为办学特色，船舶与海洋工程、核工程与核技术、水声工程等专业为行业标杆，对有志于国防军工领 域的考生有较强吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次后移的回落趋势、2026 年计划缩招约 21.4% 带来的竞争加剧效应、以及本省考生总数大幅增长约 32% 的宏观竞争压力，预计 2026 年理科（物理类）最低位次将在 2025 年基准 6528 名基础上明显前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约 5939 名，区间 5439–6439 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9564→7397→5903→5166→6528. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, increasing competition), but in 2025, there was a significant downward shift (6528, expanding by about 1362 compared to 2024), indicating a cooling of application enthusiasm in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is large, with a baseline ranking of about 6528 in 2025. The university's science category plan in Yunnan: 43 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 37 in 2024, 42 in 2025 (physics category); the 2026 plan is 33, a reduction of about 21.4% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer spots, and when demand remains unchanged or increases, competition will intensify, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been rising in recent years: 2021 50th→2022 53rd→2023 49th→2024 45th→2025 43rd→2026 43rd, stable in the 43–45 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with steadily improving recognition. The university has no significant negative events in reputation files, maintaining a stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranks 27th overall, rated 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.72 million, mainly associated with tags like 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and 'Three Seas and One Nuclear', with high short video exposure, positively attracting candidates' attention. There are no records of the university experiencing a drop in the abnormal filing files, indicating stable historical admissions. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A level, the only A-class discipline of the university. The university is characterized by 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' (shipbuilding industry, naval equipment, marine development, nuclear energy application), with majors like Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, and Underwater Acoustics Engineering being industry benchmarks, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to the national defense and military industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were rated 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, highly aligned with the university's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Yunnan Provincial General College Entrance Examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700), with the physics category estimated at about 229,000 (based on the 2025 proportion of 60.65%), indicating a substantial expansion in candidate scale and intensified overall competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Yunnan Province, making it a long-distance cross-province application. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is not high (42 in the physics category in 2025, a small proportion of the university's total national plan), and regional preference has limited impact on Yunnan candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward trend of rankings in 2025, the intensified competition due to a reduction of about 21.4% in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the macro competitive pressure from a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will significantly move forward (decreasing ranking number) from the 2025 baseline of 6528. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5939, with a range of 5439–6439.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5939, range 5439–6439. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 5439) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Nuclear Engineering Xinghai Leading Class and Automation; those in the middle of the range (around 5900) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Ocean Engineering and Electronic Information, while also attempting Tier 1; those at the upper end of the range (around 6400) should secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering relatively lower-ranked majors in Tier 2. The university has strong engineering capabilities, and its background as one of the Seven Sons of National Defense adds value to employment. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 3874, 2848, 2900, and 2704 respectively. Overall, there is a forward trend (ranking numbers decrease, competition intensifies), with a cumulative forward shift of about 1170 places from 2022 to 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2704, the highest level in recent years; the university's liberal arts group plan in Yunnan Province: 5 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 4 in 2025 (history category); the 2026 plan is 13, a significant expansion of about 225% compared to 2025. A large expansion means a notable increase in slots, which will significantly ease competition if demand remains unchanged, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking has been stable at 43–45 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university is strong in engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts programs; the recognition of its level for liberal arts candidates mainly reflects the value of the 211 platform; its reputation is stable, with no significant negative events; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', mainly associated with labels like 'Defense Seven Sons' and 'Strong Engineering School', which have limited direct appeal to liberal arts candidates; there is no record of the university experiencing a cutoff anomaly in the filing documents; the university's only A-class discipline is Control Science and Engineering (engineering), with no A-class discipline support for liberal arts programs. Liberal arts majors such as Law, Sociology, and Business Administration mainly rely on the overall 211 platform of the university, with relatively average disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
In 2024, Law was rated as 'divergent and wait-and-see' in terms of major popularity, while Business Administration was rated as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023, indicating overall divergence in popularity among liberal arts majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is about 377,900, with an estimated 148,700 in the history category (based on the 2025 proportion of 39.35%), an increase of about 32% compared to the 112,400 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, far from Yunnan, making it a long-distance cross-province application. The number of liberal arts majors is small and the scale is limited, so regional factors have a limited impact on liberal arts candidates' application decisions.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering that the 2025 ranking is already at a recent high (2704), the significant easing of competition due to the 225% expansion in the 2026 plan, and the intensified competition from an approximately 32% increase in history category candidates in the province, it is expected that the easing effect of the expansion will significantly outweigh the intensifying effect of the candidate increase. In 2026, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) will shift significantly backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 2704. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6154, with a range of 5654–6654.
